# trufflehog --exclude-paths — regex paths whose matches are NOT secrets.
# Scanning runs with --no-verification (catches unverified leaks everywhere);
# this file is the only narrowing, kept minimal.
#
# The auth session tests use a dummy HMAC key (named DUMMY-NOT-A-REAL-SECRET);
# it is not a credential, but its 32+ byte string trips entropy detectors.
web/src/lib/auth/__tests__/session\.test\.ts
